groups.theme: Users seeking a safe, non-judgmental place to express emotions and receive immediate support
example_reviews: helpful good ear listen need someone talk help deal issue need help brandon reed
search ai talk unsaid feeling app need im glad find app minute ago wysa helpful people one talk someone would listen feel thank u
groups.notes: Refined the automated group by removing reviews focused mainly on privacy, pricing, or chatbot implementation details and keeping reviews centered on emotional expression and immediate support.

groups.theme: Users evaluating guided coping exercises, mindfulness tools, and structured self-help activities
example_reviews: helpful talking also giving guided meditation breathing exercise sometimes wish won talk robot mode overall great venting space
thankyou immensely app wysa free option first go keep using app day night need app really helped four morning chat option breathing exercise so emergency number gratitude exercise meditation
groups.notes: Kept the automated exercise-focused cluster but removed reviews that were mostly about generic app quality and retained reviews discussing breathing, meditation, grounding, journaling, and exercise relevance.

groups.theme: Users dissatisfied with repetitive, robotic, or context-poor AI conversation quality
example_reviews: doesn understand anything say direct short generic exercise don work responds inappropriately
ai chat doesnt give useful insight keep repeating thing helpful way frustrating
groups.notes: Tightened the automated chatbot-quality group by keeping reviews about repetition, poor understanding, and weak context, while excluding overlap with pricing and performance complaints.

groups.theme: Users frustrated by subscription cost, paywalls, and unclear free-versus-paid access
example_reviews: disappointed used free first launched loved using app time subscription method quite expensive
subscription service free option wish known downloading app additionally ai don support
groups.notes: Revised the pricing group to emphasize transparency and paywall friction, and removed entries that were more about chatbot quality than pricing itself.

groups.theme: Users blocked by slow response times, errors, interrupted flows, and missing conversation continuity
example_reviews: slow unoptimized response feel robotic relevant said
cant even get write nickname say oops something went wrong
groups.notes: Refined the automated reliability group to focus on response speed, load failures, interruptions, and lost continuity, while dropping examples that were mainly about generic dissatisfaction.
